headline: Price Prediction: Figma Will End The Year at This Price
summary: Figma has shed nearly 80% of its value over the past year, yet analysts are quietly converging on a target that implies serious upside from here. The question is whether the fundamentals support the recovery or the risks swallow it whole.

headline: For Autodesk Stock, Patience Is the Real Catalyst
summary: The software giant looks expensive on the surface, but a two-year view reveals a valuation story that is far more grounded.

headline: E-Commerce Update - AI Transforming Digital Retail Through Innovation and Connectivity
summary: The e-commerce landscape is rapidly evolving with the integration of artificial intelligence, as highlighted by recent strategic developments and technological advancements. Adobe's acquisition of Rephrase.AI exemplifies the industry's drive to enhance AI-driven generative video capabilities, reinforcing the commitment to sophisticated e-commerce marketing strategies. The market for generative AI in e-commerce is projected to grow significantly, buoyed by AI-powered personalized...
